spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the usage of counters() inside the alt-text segment of the content property for deep nested outlines.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, letting users append outline elements at different levels and watch a11y names compute instantly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns with the primary specification motivation of making multi-level tables of contents accessible without manual scripting.

edge_cases.rationale: Performs standard CSS.supports validation specifically for counters in content slash notation.

references.rationale: References the ChromeStatus entry and parent feature index correctly.

design_system.rationale: Implements a clean, standard table-of-contents layout with correct repository theme variables.

summary: An excellent table of contents/nested outline concept that dynamically computes a11y names from hierarchical counters(), highlighting how screen readers read deep hierarchical outline items without hard-coded markup.
